purpose: Machine-readable WellFit agent work log for recording completed agent runs, changed files, checks, follow-ups, and the next recommended safe task without creating duplicate architecture or parallel systems.

governance.appendOnlyGuidance: Append a concise entry after each scoped agent run. Do not delete historical entries; mark superseded or corrected entries in a follow-up entry.

taskId.description: Task id from project-register/agent-task-queue.json or a clearly named human-request id.

status.description: Final status for this agent run.

fields.number: Pull request number or null until assigned by hosting provider.
fields.url: Pull request URL or null when unavailable.
fields.title: Pull request title.

items.notes: Short reason for failures, warnings, or skips.

followUps.items: Follow-up tasks, blockers, or review requests created for later agents.

nextRecommendedTask.description: Single safest next task recommendation, preferably from the agent task queue.

updatedTodoFiles.items: TODO/status files whose markers or references were updated.

definitionOfDoneKey.description: Definition-of-done key used for the task.

entries.title: Create WellFit cross-reference maintenance framework and agent-system analysis

checks.notes: Firebase Functions syntax checks completed successfully.
Quality gate passed with cross-reference maintenance check integrated.
Cross-reference registry/categories/files/Work Map/TODO Index coverage passed.
Autopilot reported DRY_RUN and selected the next safe task without writing files.

followUps: Future agents must apply project-register/cross-reference-maintenance.json categories after every task and run the cross-reference maintenance check before closing governance-related PRs.
entries.nextRecommendedTask: Review Route/API Drift and Concept-to-Code Gap warnings via AGENT-DRIFT-GAP-REGISTER-FOLLOWUP, using existing registers/docs only.

entries.title: Second Batch Autopilot Limited Execution probe documentation baseline

pr.title: Document second batch autopilot limited execution probe

checks.notes: Report/check-only limited execution policy check passed before implementation.
Dry run reported three planned low-risk governance candidates without writing files; this probe selected only AGENT-DOC-BASELINE-CHECK.
Autopilot dry run reported without writing files and selected a safe task.
Initial quality gate passed before documentation/register edits.

followUps: Run the next Batch Autopilot probe only for a single explicitly safe docs/register candidate, preferably product-readiness governance if it can be limited to existing register/doc alignment without source-of-truth changes.
entries.nextRecommendedTask: Evaluate AGENT-PRODUCT-READINESS-MATRIX-MAINTENANCE in a separate docs/register-only PR, stopping if it requires module status decisions or script changes outside the allowed policy.
